binding_rules: Each wrong question should bind exactly 1 primary leaf node
Each wrong question may bind 0 to 2 secondary leaf nodes
Primary leaf nodes should usually have binding_role=primary_allowed
Secondary leaf nodes may be primary_allowed or secondary_only, but must explain why they are auxiliary rather than primary
Top-k candidate retrieval should be preserved for auditability even when final binding is only 1+0..2 leaves
Binding score and forgetting score must be stored separately
Review priority may combine binding evidence and forgetting state, but should not replace either

field_specs.question_payload: Normalized wrong-question input record used by the binder
field_specs.top_k_candidates: Retrieved and reranked candidate leaf nodes, usually top-5
field_specs.binding_confidence: 0-1 confidence for the final primary binding
field_specs.binding_version: Version label of the binder or scoring policy
field_specs.review_recommendation: Review ordering and scores after combining binding result with memory state
field_specs.binding_notes: Optional additional notes from rule layer / model layer / teacher correction
field_specs.source: Source file, script, or service that produced the binding
field_specs.created_at: ISO-8601 timestamp when this binding record was produced

field_specs.teacher_comment: Optional teacher note on why the student was wrong
field_specs.source_name: Paper / notebook / worksheet / OCR source name
field_specs.source_section: Optional chapter or source section label
field_specs.difficulty_guess: Optional 0-1 or categorical estimate before binding

field_specs.node_id: Leaf node id from the knowledge tree
field_specs.rank: Rank within the candidate set or final selected list
field_specs.bind_score: 0-1 score representing how strongly the question matches this leaf
field_specs.title: Leaf title for human readability
field_specs.node_kind: Leaf node kind such as concept / formula / method / application
field_specs.evidence: Matched evidence extracted from the question and/or solution
field_specs.reason: Human-readable explanation for why this leaf is a candidate or final binding
field_specs.why_not_primary: Required when a secondary binding has high relevance but is not chosen as primary
field_specs.memory_state: Optional student-specific memory state snapshot for this leaf
field_specs.forget_score: 0-1 forgetting score for this leaf at binding time
field_specs.review_priority_score: 0-1 or unbounded review priority score after combining memory and binding

top_k_candidate_rules: Candidates should preserve their reranked order
Candidates should usually be capped at 5 for product display and audit logs
Candidates should include both score and reason
Candidates should include enough metadata to explain why one node beat another

field_specs.semantic_match_score: Dense semantic similarity between question and leaf
field_specs.solution_alignment_score: How strongly the solution pattern matches the leaf
field_specs.granularity_fit_score: How well the leaf matches the needed level of specificity
field_specs.binding_role_score: Light prior favoring primary_allowed over secondary_only when appropriate
field_specs.embedding_score: Raw or normalized dense retrieval score
field_specs.bm25_score: Raw or normalized sparse retrieval score
field_specs.rule_score: Score contributed by explicit subject rules or subtree priors

field_specs.matched_keywords: Question or solution keywords that matched the leaf
field_specs.matched_aliases: Leaf aliases or alternate names that were triggered
field_specs.matched_path_terms: Useful path-level terms such as chapter or subtree labels
field_specs.matched_solution_pattern: Short description of the solving procedure that matched the leaf
field_specs.matched_error_pattern: Short description of the student error pattern if available
field_specs.quoted_fragments: Short copied fragments from the question / answer / solution used as evidence

field_specs.student_id: Student id if binding is personalized
field_specs.stability: Positive stability value controlling forgetting speed
field_specs.last_seen_at: Last time this leaf was studied or tested
field_specs.last_wrong_at: Last time the student missed a question bound to this leaf
field_specs.wrong_count: Historical wrong-question count for this leaf
field_specs.correct_count: Historical correct-question count for this leaf
field_specs.difficulty_estimate: Optional student-specific or global difficulty estimate

field_specs.recommended_leaf_order: Ordered list of leaf node ids to review first
field_specs.recommended_question_order: Ordered list of wrong-question ids to revisit first
field_specs.recommended_bundle: Optional mixed recommendation such as one leaf card plus one representative wrong question

field_specs.target_id: Leaf node id or wrong-question id
field_specs.priority_score: Combined score used by the review scheduler
field_specs.bind_score: Optional binding contribution to final priority
field_specs.forget_score: Optional forgetting contribution to final priority
field_specs.reason: Why this item is recommended now
